Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotShape
    PotShape.action(PotAction action)
     
    PotShape
    PotSlide.addShape(PotShapeType shapeType)
    Adds a new geometric shape to the slide with default position and size.
    PotShape
    PotSlide.addShape(PotShapeType shapeType, double x, double y, double width, double height)
    Adds a new geometric shape to the slide with specified position and size.
    PotShape
    PotShape.adjust(String name, int value)
    Sets a raw adjustment value for this shape's geometry.
    PotShape
    PotShape.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.animate(PotAnimation animation)
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.appendText(String text, boolean newLine)
    Appends text to the existing content of this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.at(double x, double y)
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.bevel(Pot3DFormat.Bevel bevel)
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.bold()
    Applies bold styling to all text runs within this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.bold(boolean bold)
    Enables or disables bold styling for all text runs within this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.border(PotBorder border)
    Applies a border to this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.borderColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the border color of this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.borderColor(Color color)
    Sets the border color of this shape using a standard AWT Color.
    PotShape
    PotShape.borderWidth(double width)
    Sets the border width of this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.bringForward()
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.bringToFront()
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.clearText()
    Clears all text content from this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.cornerRadius(double radius)
    Sets the corner radius for rounded rectangle shapes.
    PotShape
    PotShape.duplicate()
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets a solid color fill for this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.fill(PotFill fill)
    Applies a complex fill to this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.fill(PotGradient gradient)
    Applies a gradient fill to this shape.
    PotShape
    PotShape.fill(Color color)
    Sets a solid color fill for this shape using a standard AWT Color.

    PotShape.flipHorizontal()

    PotShape.flipVertical()
     
    PotShape
    PotShape.font(PotFont font)
    Applies multiple font properties from a PotFont object to all text runs.
    PotShape
    PotShape.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for all text runs within this shape.

    Sets the font family for all text runs within this shape.

    Sets the font size for all text runs within this shape.

    Applies italic styling to all text runs within this shape.

    Removes the border from this shape by setting its width to zero.

    Removes any fill from this shape, making it transparent.
